%%{Retail_CustomerLoyalty}}}%% sequenceDiagram autonumber participant R as 🖼️ Renderer
(Retail_CouponSystem) participant P as 📡 Preload
(Retail_Inventory) participant M as 🖥️ Main
(Retail_PointOfSale) participant S as ⚙️ Services participant MCP as 🤖 MCP Servers participant LM as 🧠 LM Studio Note over R,LM: Application Initialization R->>P: DOMContentLoaded P->>M: ipcRenderer.invoke(Retail_OrderManagement) M-->>P: {Retail_Inventory} P-->>R: version R->>P: Initialize LM Studio P->>M: ipcRenderer.invoke(Retail_OrderManagement) M->>S: lmStudioClient.connect(Retail_CouponSystem) S->>LM: HTTP GET /v1/models LM-->>S: {Retail_CouponSystem] } S-->>M: {Retail_CouponSystem} M-->>P: status P-->>R: Update UI Note over R,LM: Chat Message Flow R->>P: User sends chat message P->>M: ipcRenderer.invoke(Retail_OrderManagement) M->>S: chatbotService.processMessage(Retail_OrderManagement) alt Intent: Knowledge Query S->>MCP: evony_search(Retail_PointOfSale) MCP-->>S: {Retail_PointOfSale] } else Intent: Calculation S->>MCP: calc_training(Retail_CouponSystem) MCP-->>S: {Retail_PointOfSale} } else Intent: Protocol S->>MCP: protocol_lookup(Retail_CouponSystem) MCP-->>S: {Retail_CouponSystem} } end S->>S: Build context from MCP results S->>LM: POST /v1/chat/completions LM-->>S: {Retail_CustomerLoyalty} S-->>M: formatted response M-->>P: response P-->>R: Display in chat Note over R,LM: Traffic Capture Flow R->>P: Webview traffic detected P->>M: ipcRenderer.send(Retail_OrderManagement) M->>S: proxyMonitor.processPacket(Retail_CouponSystem) S->>S: Decode AMF3 S->>S: Identify action S->>S: Update game state M->>P: mainWindow.webContents.send(Retail_OrderManagement) P->>R: Update traffic list Note over R,LM: Settings Flow R->>P: User saves settings P->>M: ipcRenderer.invoke(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) M->>S: store.set(Retail_Inventory) M->>S: lmStudioClient.updateSettings(Retail_CouponSystem) S->>LM: Reconnect if URL changed M-->>P: {Retail_PointOfSale} P-->>R: Show confirmation
